stage.subtitle_ar: اكتشفي كيف تتحدّث الأجهزة معًا عبر الشبكات والسحابة، وكيف نحمي بياناتنا في عالمٍ متّصل.

content.intro_ar: لا يعمل أي تطبيق أو موقع بمفرده؛ فخلف كل شاشة تجري محادثة بين أجهزة كثيرة عبر الشبكة. في هذا الدرس ستتعلّمين كيف يطلب جهازكِ المعلومات من خادم، وكيف تسافر البيانات من مكان إلى آخر. هذه الأساسيات ستفتح لكِ باب فهم الإنترنت كما يراه المهندسون.

vocab.meaning_en: a group of computers connected together to share data
vocab.example: Every phone in the office is on the same network.

vocab.meaning_en: a powerful computer that stores data and answers requests
vocab.example: The website runs on a server in another country.

vocab.meaning_en: a computer or app that asks a server for information
vocab.example: Your browser is the client that asks for the page.

vocab.meaning_en: a device that sends data to the right place in a network
vocab.example: The router at home connects all our devices.

vocab.meaning_en: a link that lets two devices exchange data
vocab.example: A slow connection makes videos stop and start.

vocab.meaning_en: a message asking a server for something
vocab.example: When you open a page, the browser sends a request.

vocab.meaning_en: the answer a server sends back to a client
vocab.example: The server's response was the whole web page.

vocab.meaning_en: a set of rules that lets devices talk to each other
vocab.example: The web uses a protocol called HTTP.

vocab.meaning_en: a unique number that identifies a device on a network
vocab.example: Every device online has its own IP address.

vocab.meaning_en: how much data a connection can carry in a moment
vocab.example: High bandwidth lets many people stream at once.

vocab.meaning_en: using radio signals instead of cables
vocab.example: Most homes now use a wireless network.

vocab.meaning_en: information that computers store and move
vocab.example: The network moves data between the devices.

paragraphs: When you send a message or open a website, your device becomes part of a network. A network is a group of computers that are connected so they can share data. Some networks use cables, so we call them wired. Others use radio signals, so we call them wireless. A small device called a router sits in the middle and sends the data to the right place.

In many networks, one computer acts as a server. A server is a powerful computer that stores information and waits for other computers to ask for it. The computer that asks is called a client — for example, your laptop or your phone. The client sends a request, and the server sends back a response. This exchange happens millions of times every second all around the world.

For all of this to work, the computers must follow the same rules. These rules are called a protocol. Every device on the internet also has an IP address, which works like a home address so the data knows where to go. When the connection is fast and the bandwidth is high, pages load quickly and videos do not stop.

key_phrases.en: The client sends a request to the server.
This network uses a wireless connection.
Every device has its own IP address.
key_phrases.ar: لكل جهاز عنوان IP خاص به.

key_phrases.en: The server sends back a response.
A router connects all the devices in the network.
key_phrases.ar: يربط الموجّه جميع الأجهزة في الشبكة.

comprehension.question: What is a network?
options: A single very fast computer
A type of web browser
A group of computers connected to share data
A program that writes code
comprehension.correct: A group of computers connected to share data
comprehension.explanation_ar: الشبكة مجموعة من الحواسيب المتّصلة لتتشارك البيانات.

comprehension.question: What does a server do?
options: Stores information and answers requests from other computers
Cleans the data on your phone
Draws the pictures on a website
Charges the battery of the router
comprehension.correct: Stores information and answers requests from other computers
comprehension.explanation_ar: الخادم يخزّن المعلومات ويستجيب لطلبات الأجهزة الأخرى.

comprehension.question: In the reading, what is the client?
options: The cable between two buildings
The rules that devices follow
A radio signal in the air
The computer that asks for information
comprehension.correct: The computer that asks for information
comprehension.explanation_ar: العميل هو الجهاز الذي يطلب المعلومات، مثل حاسوبكِ أو هاتفكِ.

comprehension.question: What is an IP address like?
options: The speed of the internet
A home address for data
A password for the router
A kind of wireless signal
comprehension.explanation_ar: عنوان IP يشبه عنوان المنزل، فيعرف مسار البيانات وجهتها.

comprehension.question: When bandwidth is high, what happens?
options: The server stops working
Devices lose their IP address
Pages load quickly and videos do not stop
The network becomes wired
comprehension.correct: Pages load quickly and videos do not stop
comprehension.explanation_ar: عندما يكون عرض النطاق عاليًا تُحمَّل الصفحات بسرعة ولا تتوقف المقاطع.

task.prompt_en: Write 3–4 sentences describing the network you use at home. What connects your devices, and what do you do on it?
task.prompt_ar: اكتبي ٣–٤ جُمل تصفين فيها الشبكة التي تستخدمينها في المنزل. ما الذي يربط أجهزتك، وماذا تفعلين عليها؟
task.guidance_ar: استخدمي ٣ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس مثل network وrouter وconnection وwireless.

content.intro_ar: كلما حفظتِ صورة أو فتحتِ تطبيقًا، من المرجّح أنكِ تستخدمين «السحابة» دون أن تشعري. في هذا الدرس ستفهمين ما هي الحوسبة السحابية حقًّا، ولماذا تعتمد عليها كل الشركات الحديثة تقريبًا. هذا المفهوم أساسي لأي تخصّص في تقنية المعلومات.

vocab.meaning_en: using computers and storage over the internet, not your own machine
vocab.example: I keep all my photos in the cloud.

vocab.meaning_en: space where data is kept
vocab.example: My phone is out of storage again.

vocab.meaning_en: a second copy of data kept in case the first is lost
vocab.example: The app makes a backup every night.

vocab.meaning_en: a large building full of servers
vocab.example: The photo is stored in a data center.

vocab.meaning_en: far away, reached over the internet
vocab.example: She has remote access to her files.

vocab.meaning_en: to send data from your device to a server
vocab.example: Please upload the report to the cloud.

vocab.meaning_en: to bring data from a server to your device
vocab.example: You can download the file to any device.

vocab.meaning_en: a company that offers cloud services
vocab.example: The provider keeps our servers running.

vocab.meaning_en: the ability to reach and use data or a service
vocab.example: I have access to the files from home.

vocab.meaning_en: something the cloud offers, like storage or email
vocab.example: Email is a service that runs in the cloud.

vocab.meaning_en: able to grow easily when more people use it
vocab.example: A scalable system handles more users with ease.

vocab.meaning_en: available whenever you need it
vocab.example: Cloud storage is available on-demand.

paragraphs: When people talk about "the cloud," they do not mean the sky. The cloud is a way of using computers and storage over the internet instead of on your own machine. When you save a photo to the cloud, you actually upload it to a large building full of servers called a data center. Later, you can download the same photo to any device you like.

The company that owns these servers is called a cloud provider. It offers storage and other services on-demand, which means you use only what you need and pay only for that. If your app suddenly gets many more users, a good system is scalable, so it can grow quickly without buying new machines by hand.

One of the best things about the cloud is remote access. Because your files live on the internet, you can reach them from home, from school, or from your phone. Many companies also keep a backup in the cloud, so if a laptop is lost or broken, the important data is still safe. This is why almost every modern app today depends on the cloud in some way.

key_phrases.en: I saved my files to the cloud.
You can access your data from anywhere.
key_phrases.ar: يمكنكِ الوصول إلى بياناتك من أي مكان.

key_phrases.en: Please upload the photo to the server.
key_phrases.ar: ارفعي الصورة إلى الخادم من فضلك.

key_phrases.en: The cloud provider keeps a backup of the data.
key_phrases.ar: يحتفظ مزوّد الخدمة بنسخة احتياطية من البيانات.

key_phrases.en: The system is scalable, so it can grow easily.
key_phrases.ar: النظام قابل للتوسّع، لذا يمكنه النموّ بسهولة.

comprehension.question: What does "the cloud" really mean?
options: Water in the sky above us
Using computers and storage over the internet
A very small phone battery
A cable between two routers
comprehension.correct: Using computers and storage over the internet
comprehension.explanation_ar: السحابة تعني استخدام الحواسيب والتخزين عبر الإنترنت بدلًا من جهازكِ وحده.

comprehension.question: What is a data center?
options: A single home computer
A kind of wireless signal
A phone app for photos
A large building full of servers
comprehension.correct: A large building full of servers
comprehension.explanation_ar: مركز البيانات مبنى كبير مليء بالخوادم.

comprehension.question: What does "on-demand" mean in the reading?
options: You use and pay only for what you need
You must buy new machines yourself
The service works only at night
You lose your files after one week
comprehension.correct: You use and pay only for what you need
comprehension.explanation_ar: «عند الطلب» تعني أنكِ تستخدمين وتدفعين مقابل ما تحتاجينه فقط.

comprehension.question: Why do many companies keep a backup in the cloud?
options: To make their internet faster
To hide their IP address
So the data is safe if a device is lost or broken
To turn a wired network into a wireless one
comprehension.correct: So the data is safe if a device is lost or broken
comprehension.explanation_ar: تحتفظ الشركات بنسخة احتياطية كي تبقى البيانات آمنة إذا فُقد جهاز أو تعطّل.

comprehension.question: What does remote access let you do?
options: Charge your laptop faster
Delete the whole data center
Build a new router at home
Reach your files from almost anywhere
comprehension.correct: Reach your files from almost anywhere
comprehension.explanation_ar: الوصول عن بُعد يتيح لكِ فتح ملفّاتك من أي مكان تقريبًا عبر الإنترنت.

task.prompt_en: Write 3–4 sentences about how you use the cloud. What do you upload or store, and why is it useful for you?
task.prompt_ar: اكتبي ٣–٤ جُمل عن كيفية استخدامك للسحابة. ماذا ترفعين أو تخزّنين، ولماذا هي مفيدة لكِ؟
task.guidance_ar: استخدمي ٣ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس مثل cloud وstorage وupload وbackup.

content.intro_ar: نحمل اليوم صورنا ورسائلنا وحتى أموالنا على أجهزتنا، لذا صار حفظها من أهمّ مهارات أي متخصّصة في التقنية. في هذا الدرس ستتعرّفين على أشهر التهديدات على الإنترنت، وعلى طرق بسيطة لحماية نفسك وبياناتك. الوعي وحده يجعلك أقوى من كثير من المهاجمين.

vocab.meaning_en: keeping computers and data safe from harm
vocab.example: Good security protects your accounts.

vocab.meaning_en: a secret word that lets only you into an account
vocab.example: Choose a long, strong password.

vocab.meaning_en: a person who tries to break into computers
vocab.example: A hacker tried to enter the system.

vocab.meaning_en: harmful software made to damage or steal
vocab.example: The email carried dangerous malware.

vocab.meaning_en: a type of malware that spreads from file to file
vocab.example: A virus can copy itself across a network.

vocab.meaning_en: a fake message that tries to steal your details
vocab.example: That phishing email asked for my password.

vocab.meaning_en: changing data into a secret code others cannot read
vocab.example: Encryption keeps your messages private.

vocab.meaning_en: a system that blocks unsafe traffic on a network
vocab.example: The firewall stopped the attack.

vocab.meaning_en: something that could cause harm to a system
vocab.example: The team watches for every new threat.

vocab.meaning_en: to keep something safe from harm
vocab.example: A strong password helps protect your account.

vocab.meaning_en: new software that fixes problems or weak points
vocab.example: Install the security update today.

vocab.meaning_en: a moment when an attacker gets in
vocab.example: The company reported a data breach.

paragraphs: Every day, we keep photos, messages, and even money on our devices, so we must protect them. Cybersecurity is the practice of keeping computers and data safe from attacks. The people who try to break in are called hackers. Some of them use malware — harmful software such as a virus — to steal information or to damage a system.

One common trick is phishing. In a phishing attack, someone sends a fake email or message that looks real and asks for your password. If you type it, the attacker can enter your account. This is why you should never share a password, and you should always check who is really asking before you reply.

Luckily, there are strong ways to stay safe. A firewall watches the traffic that comes into a network and blocks any threat it does not trust. Encryption changes your data into a secret code, so even if someone steals it, they cannot read it. You can also protect yourself with simple habits: use a long password, and install every security update quickly, because updates fix the weak points that can lead to a breach.

key_phrases.en: Choose a strong password for every account.
key_phrases.ar: اختاري كلمة مرور قوية لكل حساب.

key_phrases.en: Never click a link in a phishing email.
key_phrases.ar: لا تنقري على أي رابط في رسالة تصيّد احتيالي.

key_phrases.en: A firewall protects the network from attacks.
key_phrases.ar: يحمي جدار الحماية الشبكة من الهجمات.

key_phrases.en: Please install the latest security update.
key_phrases.ar: ثبّتي آخر تحديث أمني من فضلك.

key_phrases.en: Report any threat to the security team.
key_phrases.ar: أبلغي فريق الأمن عن أي تهديد.

comprehension.question: What is cybersecurity?
options: Keeping computers and data safe from attacks
A faster kind of internet connection
A building full of servers
A tool for editing photos
comprehension.correct: Keeping computers and data safe from attacks
comprehension.explanation_ar: الأمن السيبراني هو حماية الحواسيب والبيانات من الهجمات.

comprehension.question: What is malware?
options: A strong new password
A helpful software update
Harmful software that can steal or damage data
A company that provides cloud storage
comprehension.correct: Harmful software that can steal or damage data
comprehension.explanation_ar: البرمجية الخبيثة برنامج ضار يسرق البيانات أو يتلفها، مثل الفيروس.

comprehension.question: In a phishing attack, what does the attacker want?
options: To make your device faster
Your password or personal details
To give you a free update
To build a new firewall
comprehension.explanation_ar: في هجوم التصيّد يريد المهاجم كلمة مرورك أو معلوماتك الشخصية.

comprehension.question: What does a firewall do?
options: It stores your photos in the cloud
It speeds up your download
It writes your passwords for you
It blocks unsafe traffic coming into the network
comprehension.correct: It blocks unsafe traffic coming into the network
comprehension.explanation_ar: جدار الحماية يراقب حركة البيانات ويمنع أي تهديد غير موثوق.

comprehension.question: Why is encryption useful?
options: It turns data into a secret code others cannot read
It makes your battery last longer
It removes every password from your phone
It sends a backup to a hacker
comprehension.correct: It turns data into a secret code others cannot read
comprehension.explanation_ar: التشفير يحوّل البيانات إلى شيفرة سرّية لا يستطيع الآخرون قراءتها حتى لو سرقوها.

comprehension.question: Why should you install security updates quickly?
options: They make websites more colorful
They add more storage to the cloud
They fix weak points that could lead to a breach
They change your IP address every day
comprehension.correct: They fix weak points that could lead to a breach
comprehension.explanation_ar: التحديثات تُصلح نقاط الضعف التي قد تؤدي إلى اختراق.

task.prompt_en: Write 3–4 sentences about how you keep your accounts safe online. What habits protect you, and what would you tell a friend to avoid?
task.prompt_ar: اكتبي ٣–٤ جُمل عن كيفية حمايتك لحساباتك على الإنترنت. ما العادات التي تحميك، وبماذا تنصحين صديقتك لتتجنّبه؟
task.guidance_ar: استخدمي ٣ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس مثل password وphishing وfirewall وupdate.
